title: Use shared IdentifierDisplay in report confusion-matrix drilldown
description:
## Intent
Align report confusion-matrix detail rows with evaluation UI by rendering the reusable identifiers component instead of a single report external id value.

## Definition of done
- Reports drilldown uses shared identifier display component
- Shows full identifier set consistently with evaluations
- Existing behavior in evaluations remains unchanged

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Started implementation. Investigating report confusion-matrix detail rendering path and replacing report-specific external-id rendering with shared IdentifierDisplay used by evaluations.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented fix in shared IdentifierDisplay parser so confusion-matrix drilldown can render full identifier sets from report detail payloads (legacy id, modern value, and object-map JSON formats) instead of falling back to a single external id. Added unit tests for modern-array and map-style JSON identifier inputs. Validation: npm --prefix dashboard test -- identifier-display.test.tsx (pass).

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Follow-up from QA: still only one identifier shown in report confusion-matrix detail rows. Also surfaced Next.js /lab/reports/[id] params Promise runtime warning. Investigating lab route component and detail-row identifier normalization path.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Root cause confirmed on report f1a30d58...: detail JSON rows contain item.identifiers=null and only item.externalId (e.g., 308122970), so snapshot alone cannot render multiple identifiers. Implemented targeted UI enrichment in feedback-item-view: when row lacks itemIdentifiers relationship, fetch getItem(itemId) and use itemIdentifiers.items (sorted by position) for IdentifierDisplay; fall back to fetched identifiers/externalId from Item. Also fixed Next.js /lab/reports/[id] params Promise warning by awaiting params in route page.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Per direction, removed client-side live getItem lookup from feedback-item-view (no runtime enrichment fallback). UI now only renders identifiers present in report detail payload ( preferred, then snapshot identifiers fields). This makes behavior strict: new reports generated with backend fix show full identifiers; old reports without identifier data may only show externalId.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Per direction, removed client-side live getItem lookup from feedback-item-view (no runtime enrichment fallback). UI now only renders identifiers present in report detail payload (prefers itemIdentifiers.items when present, then snapshot identifier fields). Behavior is now strict: new reports generated with backend fix show full identifiers; old reports without identifier data may only show externalId.
